overall.description: Third-person Unreal Engine 5 gameplay footage showing a female character walking along a dirt path beside a red brick building. The character moves from a narrow corridor between the building and a long brick wall into an open courtyard featuring an amphitheater structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: path between brick building and perimeter wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the brick building, moving toward the end of the wall

entered.detail: multi-story red brick building with tall windows running along the right side of the path
tall red brick wall running parallel to the path on the left side
dense line of green deciduous trees beyond the grass field
grassy area between the dirt path and the tree line

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path flanked by a red brick building on the right and a tall brick wall on the left. Beyond the wall to the left lies a grassy field with scattered trees under a partly cloudy sky. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character progresses toward the end of the wall.

events.description: passing the end of the brick wall into the open courtyard revealing amphitheater steps

agents.ego_description: walking through the gap between the building and wall into the open courtyard area

entered.detail: semicircular tiered stone steps forming an outdoor amphitheater in the courtyard center
tall brick building visible in the distance across the courtyard
light-colored stone tile flooring covering the courtyard ground

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage into a wide open courtyard paved with stone tiles. An amphitheater with tiered steps occupies the center of the space, while a distant brick building becomes visible across the courtyard. The brick wall and tree line from the previous segment fall away to the left as the view opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined brick corridor into a wide, open architectural courtyard. It begins by trailing a female character along a narrow dirt path, flanked by a red brick building and a tall wall that partially obscures a grassy field and scattered trees. As the character progresses, the restrictive walls fall away to the left, allowing the view to expand and the lighting to open up. The scene then shifts from the dirt path onto stone tiles as the character emerges into a spacious courtyard. Finally, the camera reveals a central amphitheater with tiered steps and a distant brick building anchoring the far side of the plaza.
